svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="cart-order-activity" name="Přidání do košíku a objednávka"> <mxGraphModel dx="1347" dy="744" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="1960" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Přidání produktu do košíku a vytvoření objednávky&nbsp;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="430" x="210" y="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="start" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#000000;strokeColor=#000000;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="30" x="385" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="POST /cart/add/{productId}
Uživatel přidá produkt do košíku" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="300" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec1" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Produkt
nalezen?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="330" y="205" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec2" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Dostupný &
sklad ≥ qty?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="330" y="325" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec3" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Košík prázdný
nebo stejná
zmrzlinárna?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="84" width="160" x="320" y="445" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec4" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Produkt
již v košíku?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="330" y="579" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Sloučit –
navýšit množství" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="160" x="130" y="682" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Přidat nový produkt
do košíku" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="160" x="410" y="682" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="join1" parent="1" style="fillColor=#000000;strokeColor=#000000;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="7" width="240" x="280" y="766" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Košík aktualizován
flash: 'Produkt přidán do košíku'" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="240" x="280" y="808" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="GET /cart
Uživatel prohlíží košík" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="300" y="895" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="GET /order/checkout
Přejde k pokladně" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="300" y="982" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec5" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Košík
prázdný?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="330" y="1076" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="Vyplní CustomerDetails
(jméno, e-mail, telefon, poznámka)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="270" x="265" y="1196" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="POST /order/checkout
Odešle objednávku" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="300" y="1283" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec6" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="Cena
≥ 50 Kč?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="140" x="330" y="1378" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="OrderService.createOrder()
Vytvořit objednávku (status: NOVÁ)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="260" x="270" y="1498" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="productService.reduceStock()
Snížit sklad pro každou položku" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="260" x="270" y="1590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="cartService.clearCart()
Vymazat košík ze session" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="260" x="270" y="1682" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="act12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="redirect /order/confirmation/{id}
Objednávka potvrzena" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="260" x="270" y="1774" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="end_inner" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#000000;strokeColor=#000000;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="30" x="385" y="1864" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="end_outer" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#000000;strokeWidth=2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="42" width="42" x="379" y="1858" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="Chyba: Produkt nenalezen
redirect /" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="590" y="218" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="Chyba: Nedostatek zásob
redirect /shop/{shopId}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="590" y="338" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="Chyba: Jiná zmrzlinárna
redirect /shop/{shopId}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="590" y="465" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="Chyba: Košík je prázdný
redirect /cart" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="590" y="1089" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="Chyba: Min. hodnota nesplněna
